inputs.label: Average Volume per SKU
inputs.businessContext: Average annual production quantity per SKU.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average annual production quantity per SKU.

inputs.label: Number of Unique Components
inputs.businessContext: Total distinct raw materials or parts used across all SKUs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total distinct raw materials or parts used across all SKUs.

inputs.label: Average BOM Levels
inputs.businessContext: Average depth of the bill of materials (number of subassembly tiers).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average depth of the bill of materials (number of subassembly tiers).

inputs.label: Average Setup Time per Changeover
inputs.businessContext: Average time to change a production line from one SKU to another.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average time to change a production line from one SKU to another.

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Manufacturing overhead as percentage of direct labor and material.

businessContext_i18n.en: Manufacturing overhead as percentage of direct labor and material.

inputs.label: Complexity Type
inputs.businessContext: Category of complexity: 'product' (high SKU count), 'process' (high setup time), 'mixed' (both).

businessContext_i18n.en: Category of complexity: 'product' (high SKU count), 'process' (high setup time), 'mixed' (both).

inputs.label: Use Lean Metrics (SMED, OEE)
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies SMED-based setup reduction and OEE factors.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies SMED-based setup reduction and OEE factors.

rules.message: All numeric inputs must be positive.
For product complexity, SKU-to-component ratio should be >0.2 to avoid unrealistic data.
For process complexity, setup time should be at least 10 minutes.

thresholds.alert: Hidden cost exceeds 15% of estimated base cost – investigate complexity reduction.
Setup cost per SKU is high (>$5,000) – consider SMED or product rationalization.
Inventory holding cost exceeds $100,000 – review component commonality.
